## Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the coding standards in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I have run `npm test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and there are no errors
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` with a brief note
- [ ] I have NOT committed `auth_info/` or `.env`
